productDisplayName: Puma Men Core Lite Black Wallets
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from puma. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Made of synthetic high gloss leather with splash print on the outside and a puma brand badgeCompletely zippered with a branded zip holder for safe keeping of essentialsOne main chamber for keeping cashSeveral small convenient chambers to hold cards One buttoned pouch to hold coinsCareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
